candidates.name: Qwen3-TTS 1.7B CustomVoice

text_controls.label: Style Instruction
text_controls.placeholder: Speak clearly in a natural studio narration voice.
text_controls.description: Optional Qwen style instruction passed to the backend. Use this to steer delivery, accent, or tone without mixing those instructions into the spoken text.

generation_parameters.label: Max New Tokens
generation_parameters.description: Maximum decoder tokens for Qwen output. Higher values allow longer speech but increase generation time and memory use.

generation_parameters.label: Speaker
generation_parameters.description: Built-in Qwen speaker seed used by the custom-voice API. This changes the base speaker style before cloning controls are applied.

candidates.notes: Primary local high-quality baseline.

candidates.name: VoxCPM2

text_controls.label: Control Instruction
text_controls.placeholder: slow natural speaking pace, calm conversational tone, clear pauses
text_controls.description: Optional VoxCPM2 control prompt. It is prepended as a parenthesized instruction to steer pace, emotion, and style while keeping the target text separate in AISpeechApp metadata.

generation_parameters.label: Guidance
generation_parameters.description: Classifier-free guidance scale. Higher values can increase voice/style strength, but our tone probes found high guidance can cause tail-end ringing; lower values are usually safer and faster to stabilize.

generation_parameters.label: Inference Steps
generation_parameters.description: Diffusion sampling steps. More steps can improve quality for hard prompts but directly increases latency; in recent VoxCPM2 tone probes, 10 steps was cleaner than 7 and faster/cleaner than 14 or 20.

generation_parameters.label: Seed
generation_parameters.description: Random seed for VoxCPM2 generation. Reuse a seed for repeatability; change it when pacing, delivery, or artifacts vary between takes.

generation_parameters.label: Normalize Text
generation_parameters.description: Normalize text before synthesis. Usually improves pronunciation of numbers and punctuation with little performance cost.

generation_parameters.label: Denoise Reference
generation_parameters.description: Ask VoxCPM2 to denoise the reference audio. Only useful when the model was loaded with denoiser support; otherwise leave off.

generation_parameters.label: Retry Badcase
generation_parameters.description: Retry outputs that trip VoxCPM's badcase heuristic. Can recover odd length/rhythm failures, but increases total generation time when retries happen.

generation_parameters.label: Retry Limit
generation_parameters.description: Maximum extra attempts when Retry Badcase is enabled. Higher values may rescue bad generations but can multiply wait time.

generation_parameters.label: Retry Ratio
generation_parameters.description: Audio-to-text ratio threshold for badcase detection. Lower values reject more suspicious outputs; higher values are more permissive.

generation_parameters.label: Torch Compile
generation_parameters.description: Experimental torch.compile opt-in. In this Windows/VoxCPM2 streaming setup it has been slower and can corrupt repeated generations, so mutating compile runs are isolated and this should stay off for stable playback.

generation_parameters.label: Compile Mode
generation_parameters.description: torch.compile mode. reduce-overhead favors repeated inference latency, default is conservative, and max-autotune may spend much longer compiling.

generation_parameters.label: Min Length
generation_parameters.description: Minimum generation length. Very low values can allow short or abrupt chunks; keep at 2 unless diagnosing backend behavior.

generation_parameters.label: Max Length
generation_parameters.description: Maximum generation length. Higher values allow longer utterances but can increase memory use and the chance of late-output artifacts.

candidates.notes: Primary challenger; tokenizer-free diffusion-autoregressive stack.

candidates.name: VoxCPM2 Quantized

generation_parameters.label: Quantization
generation_parameters.description: Experimental quantization mode for this candidate only. Dynamic int8 is applied only when VoxCPM2 is running on CPU; CUDA weight-only quantization needs an additional backend such as torchao or bitsandbytes.

generation_parameters.label: Quant Targets
generation_parameters.description: Submodules eligible for quantization. LM-only keeps the audio VAE, reference encoder, and KV caches unquantized; diffusion is experimental and may affect audio quality.

candidates.notes: Experimental isolated VoxCPM2 variant for conservative LM weight quantization tests. Baseline VoxCPM2 remains unchanged.

candidates.name: VoxCPM2 TorchAO Int8

generation_parameters.label: Quantization
generation_parameters.description: TorchAO CUDA-capable weight-only quantization for this candidate only. Int8 is the safer first comparison; int4 is more aggressive and may need more quality testing.

generation_parameters.label: Quant Targets
generation_parameters.description: Submodules eligible for TorchAO quantization. LM-only keeps the audio VAE, reference encoder, and KV caches unquantized; diffusion is experimental and may affect audio quality.

candidates.notes: Experimental real TorchAO CUDA weight-only quantization candidate. Compare directly against baseline VoxCPM2 and the CPU dynamic-int8 attempt.

candidates.name: VoxCPM2 BNB Int8

generation_parameters.label: Quantization
generation_parameters.description: BitsAndBytes Linear8bitLt replacement for this candidate only. It targets CUDA int8 linear layers while leaving the audio VAE, reference encoder, and KV caches unquantized.

generation_parameters.label: Quant Targets
generation_parameters.description: Submodules eligible for BitsAndBytes replacement. LM-only keeps the audio VAE, reference encoder, and KV caches unquantized; diffusion is experimental and may affect audio quality.

candidates.notes: Experimental real BitsAndBytes CUDA int8 candidate. Compare directly against baseline VoxCPM2, CPU dynamic-int8, and TorchAO int8.

candidates.name: dots.tts soar

generation_parameters.label: Steps
generation_parameters.description: Sampling steps for dots.tts. More steps may improve clarity and speaker similarity, but each step adds latency.

generation_parameters.label: Guidance
generation_parameters.description: Guidance scale for dots.tts continuation cloning. Higher values can strengthen the prompt/voice match but may reduce naturalness.

candidates.notes: Main dots.tts quality candidate: highest zero-shot fidelity and speaker similarity variant.

candidates.name: IndexTTS2
candidates.notes: Expressiveness and controllability benchmark.

candidates.name: Fish Speech S2 Pro
candidates.notes: High-end comparison point; verify license before product use.

candidates.name: OmniVoice
candidates.notes: New multilingual zero-shot candidate.

candidates.name: MOSS-TTS v1.5
candidates.notes: Newer long-form/cloning candidate.

candidates.name: dots.tts mf

generation_parameters.label: Steps
generation_parameters.description: Sampling steps for the MeanFlow latency variant. Lower values improve speed; higher values may improve quality if artifacts appear.

generation_parameters.label: Guidance
generation_parameters.description: Guidance scale for dots.tts continuation cloning. Higher values can strengthen the prompt/voice match but may reduce naturalness.

candidates.notes: MeanFlow distilled dots.tts latency candidate; compare quality/latency against soar.

candidates.name: Fun-CosyVoice3 0.5B 2512
candidates.notes: Modern small streaming zero-shot cloning candidate; Apache-2.0 and high HF adoption.

candidates.name: GLM-TTS
candidates.notes: MIT-licensed Chinese/English zero-shot cloning model with emotion and streaming claims.

candidates.name: FireRedTTS2
candidates.notes: Long-form multi-speaker streaming TTS with cross-lingual zero-shot cloning claims.

candidates.name: VoxCPM 0.5B
candidates.notes: Smaller Apache-2.0 VoxCPM candidate; likely worth comparing against VoxCPM2 for latency.

candidates.name: Higgs Audio v3 TTS 4B
candidates.notes: Watch-list model updated recently on Hugging Face.

candidates.name: Marco-Voice
candidates.notes: Apache-2.0 CosyVoice-compatible emotional cloning framework; low adoption so far.

candidates.name: VibeVoice 1.5B

generation_parameters.label: CFG scale
generation_parameters.description: VibeVoice guidance scale. Higher values may follow the prompt more strongly, but can sound less natural or expose artifacts.

generation_parameters.label: DDPM steps
generation_parameters.description: VibeVoice diffusion steps. More steps may improve quality but increase generation time.

generation_parameters.label: Voice cloning
generation_parameters.description: Use the selected reference WAV for voice cloning. Turn off only to test VibeVoice's default voice path.

generation_parameters.label: Seed
generation_parameters.description: Random seed for VibeVoice generation. Reuse a seed for repeatability; change it to explore alternate takes.

candidates.notes: Long-form multi-speaker TTS candidate. AISpeechApp uses the VibeVoice native inference path because the generic Transformers pipeline does not expose reference-WAV voice cloning.

candidates.name: VibeVoice Realtime 0.5B
candidates.notes: High-adoption realtime model, but not a normal arbitrary WAV-cloning path; watch for voice-prompt support.

candidates.name: MioTTS 0.4B
candidates.notes: Small English/Japanese zero-shot cloning candidate with very low claimed RTF.

candidates.name: MioTTS 2.6B
candidates.notes: Larger English/Japanese MioTTS candidate; compare only if 0.4B is promising.

candidates.name: Irodori-TTS 500M v3
candidates.notes: Recent Japanese zero-shot cloning model with emoji style/effect controls; regional test candidate.

candidates.name: VieNeu-TTS v2 Turbo
candidates.notes: Vietnamese/English instant zero-shot cloning candidate; regional but current.

candidates.name: OpenF5 TTS Base
candidates.notes: Apache-2.0 F5-style alpha; lower priority because card says quality trails official NC F5-TTS.

candidates.name: Spark-TTS 0.5B
candidates.notes: Zero-shot cloning model but license is CC BY-NC-SA; keep as reference-only unless needed.

candidates.name: ZONOS2
candidates.notes: Watch-list model updated recently on Hugging Face.
